description_long: This is a low-cut athletic shoe designed for sports or active urban use, featuring a predominantly blue synthetic upper with a subtle textured pattern. The shoe has three white diagonal stripes on the lateral side, a signature design element, and a small red triangular logo on the heel. The lacing system is standard criss-cross with blue laces, and the collar and tongue are black, providing contrast. The sole is molded with small studs, primarily blue with red accents, indicating it is likely intended for turf or firm ground surfaces. The overall construction appears lightweight, with a streamlined silhouette and minimal bulk, suitable for agility and speed.
description: A blue athletic shoe with white stripes, black collar, and a studded blue-red sole, designed for sports or active urban use. Features a streamlined, lightweight build and standard lacing.
description_view_0: Side view showing three white stripes, blue upper, and red-accented studded sole.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the blue toe box, standard lacing, and black tongue.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a single white stripe and visible red sole accents.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying a red triangular logo on the heel and the black collar.
attribute_logo: Three white diagonal stripes on the lateral side; red triangular logo on the heel.
